detail1: "Jumps around the map, creating shockwaves that fling you."
detail2: - Picks a random spot around the map, and jumps to it. Making a shockwave and killing any player underneath it
detail3: - Springer is a chaos enemy and doesn't spawn in the main game.
detail4: - Springer has a limit of 2 permanant Springers, and has a temporary cap of 4.
detail5: "Victim? Checkmate." "Victim was flattened." "Victim needs to be scraped off the floor." "Victim is a little bit shorter now... a bit dead too." "Victim is a pancake now!" "That's some poor Chess Play from Victim." "I dub thee, Victim Flats-a-Lot!" "Anyone got a mop?" "Talk about a headache..."
